assertion_results.text: Agent runs gcloud auth list to see all configured accounts and which is active
assertion_results.evidence: Line 37: 'gcloud auth list' shown explicitly with explanation 'This shows every account that has been authenticated on this machine, and marks the active one with *'

assertion_results.text: Agent identifies that ci-bot@old-project.iam.gserviceaccount.com is a service account and likely wrong for interactive use
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 15-18: 'Wrong account -- the active account is ci-bot@old-project.iam.gserviceaccount.com, a service account from a different project (old-project). You need to be authenticated as alice@company.com.'

assertion_results.text: Agent checks gcloud config get-value project to see if the active project matches payments-prod
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 63-69: 'gcloud config get-value project' with explanation 'This should return payments-prod. If it returns something else (like old-project), that’s another thing we need to fix.'

assertion_results.text: Agent recommends gcloud auth login to authenticate as alice@company.com (the user's actual identity)
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 153-154: 'gcloud auth login alice@company.com' under Scenario B fix, and line 305 in the command summary.

assertion_results.text: Agent recommends gcloud config set account alice@company.com or similar to switch the active account
assertion_results.evidence: Line 139: 'gcloud config set account alice@company.com' under Scenario A fix (when alice is already authenticated but not active).

assertion_results.text: Agent mentions gcloud config configurations as a way to manage multiple account/project combos (e.g. separate configs for CI vs personal)
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 75-89: 'gcloud config configurations list' in diagnosis. Lines 256-269: creating a named config 'payments-prod-config' with separate account/project and switching between 'payments-prod-config' and 'default'.

assertion_results.text: Agent recommends verifying with gcloud compute instances list --project=payments-prod after fixing auth
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 230-234: runs 'gcloud compute instances list' in verification. Line 277: 'gcloud compute instances list --project=payments-prod' shown as explicit verification with project flag.

assertion_results.text: Agent does NOT just say 'run gcloud auth login' without first diagnosing why the wrong account is active
assertion_results.evidence: Steps 1-2 (lines 27-126) perform thorough diagnosis including auth list, config values, configurations, and environment variable checks before any fix is applied in Step 3 (line 129+).
